title: Eugene‘s 3D Stuffs
body:
This is originally for modpack [AnimateCraft: Lankeren](https://modrinth.com/modpack/animatecraft-lankeren). If you like this content, I'm sure you'll like that modpack, too. Welcome to check it out!
---

Mojang used 3D perspective when painting textures for some items, but it looked very strange when these items were placed flat on the desktop. Therefore, I made them in 3D form to make them more decorative,

I tried my best to create their 3D models in the form of the most authentic 2D texture, and the voxel size was consistent with the original square, perfectly avoiding the problem of pixel-mixing.

### No need for Optifine!
